category.name: Custom Text
category.description: Add a text on the video

styles.name: Text
styles.description: Text displayed on the video

styles.description: Change the vertical position of the text (pixels from center)

styles.description: Change the horizontal position of the text (pixels from center)

styles.name: Width
styles.description: Set width of custom text container

styles.name: Always Show
styles.description: Always show the text (ignore timing)

styles.description: Change the time where the text appears

styles.description: Change the time where the text disappears

eng-mustafakhattaba.text: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful
All praise is for Allah— Lord of all worlds,
Master of the Day of Judgment.
You ˹alone˺ we worship and You ˹alone˺ we ask for help.

alignmentMetadata.matchedText: ٱهْدِنَا ٱلصِّرَٰطَ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمَ صِرَٰطَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ

eng-mustafakhattaba.text: Guide us along the Straight Path,

alignmentMetadata.matchedText: ٱهْدِنَا ٱلصِّرَٰطَ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمَ صِرَٰطَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ

eng-mustafakhattaba.text: the Path of those You have blessed—
not those You are displeased with, or those who are astray.
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful
I do not worship what you worship,
nor do you worship what I worship.
I will never worship what you worship,

clips.indopakText: وَ لَاۤ اَنۡـتُمۡ عٰبِدُوۡنَ مَاۤ اَعۡبُدُؕ

eng-mustafakhattaba.text: nor will you ever worship what I worship.
You have your way, and I have my Way.”

eng-mustafakhattaba.1:2: All praise is for Allah— Lord of all worlds,
eng-mustafakhattaba.1:4: Master of the Day of Judgment.
eng-mustafakhattaba.1:5: You ˹alone˺ we worship and You ˹alone˺ we ask for help.
eng-mustafakhattaba.1:6: Guide us along the Straight Path,
eng-mustafakhattaba.1:7: the Path of those You have blessed— not those You are displeased with, or those who are astray.
eng-mustafakhattaba.109:2: I do not worship what you worship,
eng-mustafakhattaba.109:3: nor do you worship what I worship.
eng-mustafakhattaba.109:4: I will never worship what you worship,
eng-mustafakhattaba.109:5: nor will you ever worship what I worship.
eng-mustafakhattaba.109:6: You have your way, and I have my Way.”

categories.name: General Settings
categories.description: Configure general settings for the video

styles.name: Video Quality & Orientation
styles.description: Quality and orientation of the video

styles.name: Subtitle Fade Duration
styles.description: Duration of fade in/out effect in milliseconds

styles.name: Video & Audio Fade
styles.description: Configure export fade in/out for video and audio.

styles.name: Subtitles Anti-Collision
styles.description: Prevent subtitle overlap

styles.name: Subtitle Spacing
styles.description: Minimum spacing between subtitles (in pixels)

categories.name: Overlay
categories.description: Add a color overlay on top of the video

styles.name: Enable Overlay
styles.description: Enable or disable the overlay

styles.name: Overlay Color
styles.description: Color of the overlay

styles.name: Overlay Opacity
styles.description: Opacity of the overlay

styles.name: Overlay Mode
styles.description: Uniform or vertical fade (up, down, or center)

styles.name: Fade Intensity
styles.description: Controls fade strength when overlay mode is not uniform

styles.name: Fade Coverage
styles.description: Controls how much vertical area is used by fade versus non-fade zones

styles.name: Overlay Blur
styles.description: Blur level of the overlay

styles.name: Custom CSS
styles.description: Add custom CSS to the overlay (e.g., animations)

categories.name: Surah Name
categories.description: Control display of the Surah name

styles.name: Show Surah Name
styles.description: Show or hide the Surah name

styles.name: Always Show
styles.description: Always show the Surah name (ignore timing)

styles.name: Time Appearance
styles.description: Change the time where the Surah name appears

styles.name: Time Disappearance
styles.description: Change the time where the Surah name disappears

styles.name: Vertical Position
styles.description: Change the vertical position of the surah name (pixels from center)

styles.name: Horizontal Position
styles.description: Change the horizontal position of the surah name (pixels from center)

styles.name: Latin Text Format
styles.description: Format of the Surah name display. Use <number>, <transliteration>, <translation>, <min-range> and <max-range> tags to customize.

styles.name: Show Arabic
styles.description: Show the Surah name in Arabic

styles.name: Show Latin
styles.description: Show additional Latin text (see Latin Text Format)

styles.name: Size
styles.description: Scale size of Surah Calligraphy

styles.name: Spacing
styles.description: Adjust spacing between the Arabic Surah name and its Latin equivalent

styles.name: Opacity
styles.description: Adjust the opacity of the Surah name

styles.name: Text Styles
styles.description: Style for the Latin transliteration of the Surah name

categories.name: General
categories.description: General styling options for subtitles

styles.name: Show Subtitles
styles.description: Toggle the visibility of subtitles

styles.name: Show Verse Number
styles.description: Toggle the visibility of verse numbers

styles.name: Right-to-Left
styles.description: Set the text direction to Right-to-Left

styles.name: Decorative Brackets
styles.description: Wrap Arabic subtitle text with decorative brackets

styles.name: Decorative Brackets Style
styles.description: Choose the glyph pair used for decorative brackets (opening first, closing second). Uses QPC2BSML font.

styles.name: Mushaf
styles.description: Choose the Arabic script source for Quran subtitles.

styles.name: Verse Number Format
styles.description: Change the format of verse numbers. Use <number> tag to customize.

styles.name: Verse Number Position
styles.description: Set the position of verse numbers

categories.name: Text Styling
categories.description: Control the appearance and formatting of subtitle text

styles.name: Text Color
styles.description: Change the color of the text

styles.name: Font Size
styles.description: Adjust the size of the text

styles.name: Font Family
styles.description: Select the font family for the text

styles.name: Font Weight
styles.description: Set the thickness of the font

styles.name: Enable Italic
styles.description: Enable italic styling for the text

styles.name: Text Transform
styles.description: Transform the case of the text

styles.name: Letter Spacing
styles.description: Adjust spacing between characters

styles.name: Word Spacing
styles.description: Adjust spacing between words

styles.name: Line Height
styles.description: Adjust spacing between lines

styles.name: Max Height (Make Text Fit)
styles.description: Limit text height and auto-adjust font size to fit. 0 = no limit.

styles.name: Reactive Font Size
styles.description: Used by the 'Make Text Fit' feature to adjust font size based on container size

categories.name: Word by word highlight
categories.description: Highlight Arabic words over time when word-by-word timestamps are available

styles.name: Enable wbw highlight
styles.description: Enable or disable timed word-by-word highlighting

styles.name: Wbw color
styles.description: Color applied to highlighted words

styles.name: Enable underline
styles.description: Underline highlighted words

styles.name: Persist highlighted words
styles.description: Keep previously highlighted words colored after they have been read

styles.name: Enable wbw background
styles.description: Enable a background color behind highlighted words

styles.name: Background color
styles.description: Background color applied to highlighted words

styles.name: Underline thickness

categories.name: Position & Layout
categories.description: Control the position and spacing of subtitles on screen

styles.description: Used if the 'Make Text Fit' feature is not set to adjust Y position based on other subtitles positions so that they do not overlap

styles.description: Change the vertical position of the text (pixels from center)

styles.description: Change the horizontal position of the text (pixels from center)

styles.name: Vertical Text Alignment
styles.description: Align text vertically when paragraph height is large

styles.name: Background Opacity
styles.description: Control the transparency of the background

styles.name: Border Radius
styles.description: Round the corners of the background

styles.name: Horizontal Padding
styles.description: Add left and right padding when using a background

styles.name: Custom CSS for Background
styles.description: Write any CSS for custom Background (gradient, pattern, ...). Use !important if needed. Exemple: background: linear-gradient(to right, #ff0000, #0000ff) !important;

categories.name: General
categories.description: General styling options for subtitles

styles.name: Show Subtitles
styles.description: Toggle the visibility of subtitles

styles.name: Show Verse Number
styles.description: Toggle the visibility of verse numbers

styles.name: Right-to-Left
styles.description: Set the text direction to Right-to-Left

styles.name: Decorative Brackets
styles.description: Wrap Arabic subtitle text with decorative brackets

styles.name: Decorative Brackets Style
styles.description: Choose the glyph pair used for decorative brackets (opening first, closing second). Uses QPC2BSML font.

styles.name: Mushaf
styles.description: Choose the Arabic script source for Quran subtitles.

styles.name: Verse Number Format
styles.description: Change the format of verse numbers. Use <number> tag to customize.

styles.name: Verse Number Position
styles.description: Set the position of verse numbers
